documentation.highlight: OpenRPC linter PR adds ~25-28 recommended rules, `make lint` command, ~34 warnings in current execution-apis spec
Tag-driven release pipeline PR adds versioned docs, assembled-spec branches, and automated release-note PRs for execution-apis
Execution-apis current version is 1.0 Beta 4 (last tagged April 19, 2024); Beta 5 planned this week; V1.0 targeting Glamsterdam release

spec_changes.highlight: Proposal to relax block param from required to optional (default latest) for all five state ETH methods, aligning with eth_call/estimateGas behavior; Nethermind and Erigon already default to latest

debug_executionWitness has divergent implementations across clients: Geth uses JSON header with empty keys; Reth/Nethermind/Erigon use RLP bytes with populated keys; needs broader ZK EVM working group discussion before speccing
Error code/message inconsistency across clients (Nethermind issue #11412): Geth returns generic codes where specific codes expected; needs Discord discussion before ACDE escalation

action_items.action: Erigon, Geth (Cena/Felix) to approve block-param relaxation PR #809 before merge
Chase to connect with Kev / ZK EVM working group on debug_executionWitness wire format alignment
Post error code/message inconsistency discussion to Execution Dev Discord channel

decisions.decision: Release execution-apis 1.0 Beta 5 this week; target V1.0 release at Glamsterdam
Merge eth_capabilities PR #755 once CI passes

targets.target: This week - execution-apis 1.0 Beta 5 tagged; Hive updated to run tagged version
